texto: I look at graphic design as communication, meaning that the work has to have a vibe to connect to the viewer or perceiver. I make a black and white drawing and then add color digitally, bringing in a contemporary pattern to the composition to create a vibrance.
explicacao: Citação de John Van Hamersveld sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “I look at graphic design as communication, meaning that the work has to have a vibe to connect to…” articula reflexao, work, black-and-white em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e black-and-white.
